Vitale Bros. Making Walls Come Alive.

Tampa Bay's premier mural studio — turning blank surfaces into bold, lasting stories for brands, stadiums, businesses, and homes since 1992.

Our Story

Built on
Hustle & Heart

What started with a sketch on a napkin in 1992 became one of Tampa Bay's most iconic mural studios. Johnny Vitale and his crew have been transforming walls, building brands, and shaping St. Petersburg's identity as a world-class arts destination ever since.

1992
Founded
3+
Decades Strong
Read Our Story →
What We Do

Creativity
Without Limits

From massive building murals to intimate canvas pieces, we bring your vision to life.

See All Work →

Commercial Murals

Stadiums, storefronts, corporate walls. Large-scale art that doubles as signage for your brand.

Explore

Residential

Pools, fences, garages, and indoor walls. Your home, turned into art.

Explore

Live & Events

Watch art happen. Live painting for galas, festivals, activations, and openings.

Explore

Community & Civic

Public art, festival pieces, school walls. The work that helped shape St. Pete.

Explore
How We Work

From napkin sketch
to finished wall.

Simple, collaborative, and built to keep you confident all the way through. Most projects run four to six weeks, start to finish.

01
Brief & Visit
We meet at your space, walk the wall, and talk through goals, audience, and budget. Free consultation, no pressure.
02
Sketch & Quote
You get concept sketches and a clear price. We refine together until the direction feels unmistakably yours.
03
Paint
We prep the surface and bring the art to life. Most walls take 3 to 14 days depending on scale. We keep you posted with progress shots.
04
Unveil & Protect
A UV-rated clearcoat keeps the colors alive for 7+ years in Florida sun. We throw in a touch-up guarantee for the first year.

Testimonials

What Our Clients Say

The impact of our murals speaks for itself. Here's what our partners think.

★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"When it comes to impeccable artwork, mural work and professionalism, the Vitale Bros are top tier. Not only have they served the St. Pete and Tampa communities with their unparalleled talent for many years, they have helped mold and develop the local art scene. I can't recommend them enough."

AC
Ashley Cantero
Client, St. Petersburg
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"Personable, professional, and talented all rolled into one creative package. Pricing was completely fair for the amount of work they delivered, and on a very timely schedule."

DP
Dan Pemberton
Pesky Pelican
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"I cannot thank the Vitale Brothers enough for the magnificent piece of art they created for my fiancé. Their work is magnificent, they are truly talented artists."

MP
Melissa Phillips
Client, Tampa Bay
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"Finally got to meet the wonderful brother muralists today finishing off their child portraits on the Evil Don Tattoo wall. Wonderful work."

MS
Michael Sheehan
Client, St. Petersburg
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"These guys have been creating art their entire lives and their work is top notch. Whether you're looking for a mural, a commission, or just to support local art, the Vitale Bros are the first place to start."

EY
Elizabeth Young
Client, Tampa Bay
★ ★ ★ ★ ★

"The Vitale Brothers are incredibly talented artists and wonderful people. Their artwork not only beautifies but brings communities together."

AH
Amanda Hargett
Client, St. Petersburg
Daily Art Feed

Fresh from the Studio

@vitalebros →
Before you email us

A few common questions.

Most clients ask the same handful of things on our first call. Here they are up front, so you can plan your wall with confidence.

Still Got Questions? Ask Us →
It depends on size, detail, and location, but most projects fall between $4,000 for a small interior wall and $40,000+ for stadium or multi-story exterior work. We give you a clear, fixed quote after the first visit. No surprises.
Small indoor pieces are often done in 2 to 4 days. Typical exterior walls run 1 to 3 weeks. Large commercial projects can take a month or more, and we always share a schedule before starting.
With proper surface prep and a UV-rated clearcoat, our exterior murals hold strong color for 7 to 10+ years, even in Florida sun and salt air. We include a touch-up guarantee for the first year.
Interior murals generally don't need permits. Exterior murals depend on your city and zoning. We've worked with St. Pete, Tampa, and surrounding municipalities for decades and can help navigate the process.
Always. We can start from a logo, a mood board, a color palette, or nothing at all. Most client relationships begin with a sketch session where we translate your brand into something that works at wall scale.
Yes. We've painted in Las Vegas, nationally for SalonCentric, and regularly take projects across Florida. Travel and lodging are billed at cost.
Let's Create Something

Ready to Transform
Your Space?

Let's turn your blank wall into a masterpiece. Whether it's a business, school, stadium, or your backyard — we've got you covered.
